examples: The images provoked strong surges of nostalgia for the days of yore.
The older people remember days of clear-aired yore.
It's not what the cloth-cap and meat-pie fans of yore would have bought.
Not a problem in chips of yore, but very much a problem these days.
One truckload is equivalent to 40 truckloads of the already inflated bubbles of yore.
